title: ANI NA ANI ANENYENYEDZI TAKE
author: ABASID 1841
description: Teaching from THE ABASID CALIPHATE collection: ANI NA ANI ANENYENYEDZI TAKE (Everyone Has Their Star)

verses.text: 18.ANI NA ANI ANENYENYEDZI TAKE 13/01/26 BVUNZO: Toti muri pasangano raberekwa vaporofiti vaviri
Mumwe chete we idi ne mumwe chete wenhema
Pakuvamba kwavo basa, mumwe anoti ndatumwa na BABA kubva kudenga ndanzi Chengetai mitemo ya MWARI
Mumwewo wechipiri obva ati ndatumwa na BABA kubva kudenga ndanzi Chengetai mitemo
Imi wamunotenda kuti abva kudenga pavaviri ava ndeupi?
ANSWER: Wekutanga ati chengetai mitemo yaMwari
Umwe ati mitemo ya MWARI
Mumwe angoti mitemo
ANSWER: Inini hapana kana 1 wandotenda nekuti hazvisi enough kuti nditende kuti abva kuna Mwari
Right mauya ne imwe nyaya
Ndiri kuuya ipapo
Hapana munhu anombofa akanyatso ziva kuti ABASID zva ati Ndabva kudenga idi
Kana kuti Johani zva ati ndabva kudenga IDI
Mwari akati musanetseke kuzo tsvaga kuti wekudenga ndeupi
Ndino tanga nda nongedza ndega zvisina ano ramba
Chinzwai manongedzero aMWARI
BVUNZO: JESU pa aka berekwa, vanhu vakaziva sei kuti ndiye JESU???
ANSWER: Vakaona Nyenyedzi
MATEO 2 verse 2 inoti chiyi
Mateo 2:2 inoti:
“Iye wakaberekwa Mambo wavaJudha aripi?
nokuti takaona nyeredzi yake kumabvazuva, tikauya kuzomunamata.”
BVUNZO: Hanzi nyenyedzi yani???
ANSWER: Yake
Exactly YAKE
Kureva kuti vazivi ve mabvezuva ndo vega vai iziva nekuti vakabvuma kuziva
Zvino pakati pevanhu vano paridzwa pano buda vazivi nema dofo
Madofo ndo ekuti ukava ratidza nyenyedzi yako nhasi, mangwana vatoi kanganwa
Asi vanoramba vachi dzidza vacha gara vachiyi ziva
Zvekuti painozo famba vanoitevera
NYENYEDZI chaiyo kwe mweya muva porofiti
Nekuti uyo hapana anoziva kuti zvawati ndiri nyenyedzi uri kurevesa here
Nekuti maporofiti maviri aye ose anogona kuti ndiri nyenyedzi ye Denga asi vachitaura zvakasiyana
Saka hapana messiah ano berekwa pasina nyenyedzi yamu pupura
Iye ndiye anozoratidza mumwe ne mumwe nyenyedzi yakewo
Nekuti munhu wese ane nyenyedzi yake kudenga
Nyenyedzi chaiyo kwete ngirozi isingaoneke
TIRI ndaza Ye NYENYEDZI kuna BABA ABRAHAM
Mwari pa akaita chirangano ne munhu akamuti iwe newe nyenyedzi dzenyu idzo kudenga
Nyenyedzi chaidzo
Kana uchida kufamba munzira yaka rurama gara uchi tarisa nyenyedzi yako mufambiro wairi kuita kudenga
Ichaku ratidza kuti izvezvi wakuda kunotsika pakati
Ndisati ndadzika dzika, nekuti kuna vaye va BABA JOHANI vanoti akuda kurasa musoro wenyaya wa Tenzi Baba Johani
Regai tione kuti pakuberekwa kwavo zvaka fambawo sei
1 OCTOBER 1914
BVUNZO: Pa 30 apo neche pasi pakanzi 2
Hanzi munofanira kuzo paridza pamusoro pe chiratidzo cheyi na Baba Johani?
Zviri kutonzi MUSORO we NYAYA
ANSWER: Nekuwonekwa kweNyenyedzi
Mungafunge kuti ndini ndanyora kuno
Nezuro ndakakupai rimwe raitaura nhau dza CHAMINUKA
Nhasi ndakupai Rimwe iri
Ose ma book a Baba Johane
Pakuberekwa kwavo kwakato onekwa NYENYEDZI yavo, MURUNGU wepa MAITLAND FARM ku KADOMA ndiye akaiziva
Aka unganidza vashandi vake akati nhasi munyika ino maberekwa Messiah
Izvi ndo zvino siyanisa JOHANI ne vamwe vose vakazonzi VATUMWA
Rimwe zuva mukandi nyengetedza ndokuratidzai nyenyedzi yavo moiona muri ikoko ndiri kuno
Mwari akati hapana anouya pasi oti ndini messiah Iye asina nyenyedzi yake yaratidza
Nga angoti ndiri muporofiti
Izvi zvai itirwa kuti Mwari akasa nongedza ega, vari BRITAIN vachati wedu ndiye
Vari ku RUSSIA voti ayewa abarwa kuno
Vari ku ZIMBABWE votiwo kwedu
Vari NAMIBIA voti wedu ari kuporesa
Vamwe vose voti kana wedu
Vamwe voti wedu ari kuzaza ma bus 1000 pa rwendo rwe Mweya
Vamwe voti wedu ari kuzaza 1001
Saka Mwari akati ndini ndega ndino nongedza
Mu bible mune tsamba rakasiwa risina kuiswamo
Rinonzi book of JASHER
Saka vamwe vanogona kufunga kuti rakasiwa nekuti harisi ra MWARI
Nyamba kwete, iro bible rinoto taura nezvaro
Ndipeiwo JOSHUA 10 verse 13 muchishona kana chirungu
Hatisi kufunda bible kutsvaga zivo
Tiri pakutsvaga masunuguriro amuchaita hama dzenyu dzino verenga
Joshua 10:13 (MuchiShona) inoti:
“Zuva rikamira, nemwedzi wakamira, kusvikira rudzi rutsiva vavengi varwo.
Hazvina kunyorwa here mubhuku raJashari?
Zuva rikamira pakati pedenga, rikarega kuvira kwezuva rose
Joshua 10:13 (English – KJV) says:
“And the sun stood still, and the moon stayed,
until the people had avenged themselves upon their enemies.
Is not this written in the book of Jasher?
So the sun stood still in the midst of heaven, and hasted not to go down about a whole day.”
Vachena vakari siya nekuti raizo buritsa dzimwe nhau dzinova roverera
Handei kwariri ,
Tinzwe kuti rinoti chiyi pa chapter 53 zvakasaka risaiswe mu bible
Zvavaisada kuti vanhu vazive
Tsvagai BOOK of JASHER chapter 53 verse 18 to 30
Moti SHONA version
📜 BOOK of JASHER – Chitsauko 53:18–30 (MuchiShona)
Josefa akaraira kuti vauye nechishandiso chaakanga aine chine mufananidzo wedenga nenyenyedzi, chaaisarudza nacho nguva nezviitiko;
Josefa akabva ati kuna Bhenjamini:
“Ndakanzwa kuti vaHebheru vanoziva uchenjeri hwese; iwe unozivawo here?”
Bhenjamini akati:
“Muranda wenyu anoziva zvese zvandakadzidziswa nababa vangu.”
Bhenjamini paakaona mufananidzo wenyenyedzi dzedenga, akanzwisisa zvakadzama,
ndokuziva kuti munhu akanga agere pachigaro cheushe pamberi pake
ndiye Josefa, mukoma wake.
Bhenjamini akashamisika zvikuru.
Bhenjamini akati kuna Josefa:
“Ndiri kuona kuti mukoma wangu Josefa ndiye agere pano pachigaro cheushe.”
Asi Josefa akamurayira kuti asazivise vamwe hama dzavo.
Josefa akati achada kuyedza hama dzake kuti aone moyo wavo.
Josefa akarayira mukuru weimba yake kuti azadze masaga avo nezvokudya,
uye aisa kapu yesirivha muhomwe yaBhenjamini.
Vakabva vaendeswa parwendo rwavo.
Mushure mezvo mukuru waJosefa akavatevedza
ndokuvatongera mhaka yekuba kapu yesirivha.
Vakatsvaka masaga avo,
uye kapu ikawanikwa muyaBhenjamini.
Hama dzacho dzakabvarura nguo dzadzo neshungu,
ndokudzokera dzichitora Bhenjamini kuna Josefa.
Judha akatsamwa zvikuru mumoyo make,
achifunga kuti Josefa aida kuparadza hama dzese.
Josefa akati:
“Sei makaita chinhu ichi chokutora kapu yangu yesirivha?”
Josefa aiziva mumoyo make kuti izvi zvakanga zvaitwa
kuti vawane chokwadi chokuti Josefa aive kupi.
Josefa aka tengeswa ku EGYPT ne vakoma vake
Ndakambotaura paye
Vakoma vake va pindwa ne nzara vakati handei ku egypt hanzi ndokune matura achine chikafu
Vasvika ikoko , vakawana JOSEPH aine ma KEY ematura
Valasvika josefa ari iye atova mutevedzeri wa pharoah
Havana kuziva kuti ndiye muninina wavo uyaaaa
Vaitoti mu Egyptian wo sa PHAROAH
Ipapo takuto ona kuti saka Josepha na PHAROAH vaiva ne ganda rimwe chete
Nekuti zvinonzi the brothers did not recognise their brother because they thought he was EGYPTIAN
Vachena wovati but handiti mati ma PHAROAH akarwisa va ISRAEL vaiva vatema
Voti hongu Josepha havana kumuziva nekuda kwe mapfekero ake
Zvino muchena akapfeka nhembe ungatoti ndafunga kuti mushona here
Moses akarerwa mu imba ya PHAROAH
Akato kura achifunga kuti Mwana wa Pharoah zveshuwa
Akatozonzi na MARIAM iwe sha hausi mwana wa Pharoah , uri mu ISRAEL sesu
Iye akatomboti kana
Ndokuzo vhunza kumba kwacho ndokuziva kuti aiva mu Israel
Aizo zvi fananidza sei ne mutema iye ari muchena
Ndo pandakati izwi rakanga rakazvi vanza paraiti jesu aka rambwa ne vachena
Ayewa ndimi makamu ramba
Vachena ndokumutenga
Ndokubva vagarika, imi musina
Rino rwadza haro asi idi
Ma dherera paye, ndo pamakanzi gerai vhudzi
Mutange mashandira izwi ramakambo ramba
Kureva kuti SAMSON ndimi
Vana ve ZUVA
Ndo aka dherera Mwari
Ndokupera masimba avo
Kusvika va mapofu
Vachena vanozviziva
Chavasiri kuziva ndechokuti vhudzi ra SAMSON raku kura zvakare
Ava kugadzirira kusaidzira chinamato chavo chowira pasi
Chova tsitsirira
Vakoma vatevera ku EGYPT havana kuziva Josepha
Josepha ndokudedza BENJAMIN muninina wake
Aiva mwana wa mai vake ndokuti
Ndakanzwa kuti Va hebrew vanoziva nyenyedzi dzavo
Benjamin ndokuti hongu, ini ndinoziva dzandaka ratidzwa na BABA, kureva JAKOPO
Josepha ndo kutuma mushandi kuti iwe tora telescope 🔭 ne map yangu yekudenga uuye nazvo Telescope yakare ndokuuya
Josepha ndokuti kuna BENJAMIN tsvaga nyenyedzi ye mukoma wako Josepha kuti iri papi kudenga nhasi
Uya Benjamin ndo kutarisa kudenga
Denga chairo SKY
Ndokuona Nyenyedzi ya JOSEPHA iri pedyo ne nyenyedzi yake kudenga
Ndokushamisika achiti, ahhhh ahhhh ndaona nyenyedzi ya Josepha iri pedyo ne yangu pa side chaipo pe yangu kudenga,
Kureva kuti
Imi mambo ndimi JOSEPHA mukoma wangu
Kureva kuti JOSEPHA dai akangoti ndini, hapana aizvi bvuma
Zvimwe chete na Jesu , dai akangoti ndini, hakuna aizvi bvuma
Zvimwe chete na BABA JOHANI , dai vakangoti ndini , hakuna aizvi bvuma
Zvimwe chete na Ini
Handingati ndini
Ndisina kuku ratidzai
Ndo rungano urwu

And he ordered them to bring before him his map of the stars, whereby Joseph knew all the times, and Joseph said unto Benjamin, I have heard that the Hebrews are acquainted with all wisdom, dost thou know anything of this?

19 And Benjamin said, Thy servant is knowing also in all the wisdom which my father taught me, and Joseph said unto Benjamin, Look now at this instrument and understand where thy brother Joseph is in Egypt, who you said went down to Egypt.

20 And Benjamin beheld that instrument with the map of the stars of heaven, and he was wise and looked therein to know where his brother was, and Benjamin divided the whole land of Egypt into four divisions, and he found that he who was sitting upon the throne before him was his brother Joseph, and Benjamin wondered greatly, and when Joseph saw that his brother Benjamin was so much astonished, he said unto Benjamin, What hast thou seen, and why art thou astonished?

21 And Benjamin said unto Joseph, I can see by this that Joseph my brother sitteth here with me upon the throne, and Joseph said unto him, I am Joseph thy brother, reveal not this thing unto thy brethren; behold I will send thee with them when they go away, and I will command them to be brought back again into the city, and I will take thee away from them.
22 And if they dare their lives and fight for thee, then shall I know that they have repented of what they did

unto me, and I will make myself known to them, and if they forsake thee when I take thee, then shalt thou remain with me, and I will wrangle with them, and they shall go away, and I will not become known to them.

23 At that time Joseph commanded his officer to fill their sacks with food, and to put each man's money into his sack, and to put the cup in the sack of Benjamin, and to give them provision for the road, and they did so unto them.

24 And on the next day the men rose up early in the morning, and they loaded their asses with their corn, and they went forth with Benjamin, and they went to the land of Canaan with their brother Benjamin.

25 They had not gone far from Egypt when Joseph commanded him that was set over his house, saying, Rise, pursue these men before they get too far from Egypt, and say unto them, Why have you stolen my master's cup?

26 And Joseph's officer rose up and he reached them, and he spoke unto them all the words of Joseph; and when they heard this thing they became exceedingly wroth, and they said, He with whom thy master's cup shall be found shall die, and we will also become slaves.

27 And they hastened and each man brought down his sack from his ass, and they looked in their bags and the cup was found in Benjamin's bag, and they all tore their garments and they returned to the city, and they smote Benjamin in the road, continually smiting him until he came into the city, and they stood before Joseph.
28 And Judah's anger was kindled, and he said, This man has only brought me back to destroy Egypt this day.
29 And the men came to Joseph's house, and they found Joseph sitting upon his throne, and all the mighty men standing at his right and left.

30 And Joseph said unto them, What is this act that you have done, that you took away my silver cup and went away? but I know that you took my cup in order to know thereby in what part of the land your brother was.
NDICHADZOKA
